highlights.text: I wrote yesterday: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend until it ends.
All short squeezes and major legs up in ES are caused by my core setup : The Failed Breakdown and this is the footprint of institutional accumulation.
I wrote Tuesday at 4pm: “Failed Breakdowns of 5493 [Mondays low] would be of interest.” What did we do Wednesday morning?
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into two major Failed Breakdowns that triggered this squeeze from Wednesday, as there is plenty to learn from them.

post_title: 9 Green Days In A Row For SPX. Pullback Next Week? May 5th Plan
